params.demand: Arbiter-specific demand data encoded by the escrow creator.
params.escrowUid: The UID of the escrow attestation being fulfilled.
params.fulfillment: The EAS attestation being used as fulfillment.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

EXECUTOR_SENTINEL().notice: Sentinel address meaning "the fulfiller who created the fulfillment".

MAX_SPLITS().notice: Maximum number of splits allowed per decision.

activeSettlement().notice: Decision key the splitter is currently collecting, or zero when idle.

arbitrate(bytes32,bytes32,(address,uint2.notice: Records the caller's split decision for a future fulfillment intent and escrow.

attestationIntentHash((bytes32,bytes32,u.notice: Hashes the semantic attestation fields an oracle can approve before EAS assigns a UID.

attestationIntentHash(bytes32,address,ad.notice: Hashes an attestation intent from pre-encoded attestation data.
Hashes an attestation intent from an already-computed data hash.

collectAndDistribute(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Collects a native token escrow and distributes ETH. Reverts if any transfer fails.

createFulfillment(address,bytes,uint64,b.notice: Creates a fulfillment attestation addressed to this splitter and records the caller as fulfiller.

createFulfillmentAndCollectAndDistribute.notice: Creates a splitter-owned fulfillment and atomically collects and distributes the escrow.

decodeDemandData(bytes).notice: Decodes ABI-encoded native-token splitter demand data.

eas().notice: EAS contract used to load escrow and fulfillment attestations.

escrowObligation().notice: Canonical escrow obligation this splitter is allowed to collect.

fulfillers(bytes32).notice: External fulfiller recorded for splitter-owned fulfillments.

fulfillmentIntentHash((bytes32,bytes32,u.notice: Hashes a splitter fulfillment intent, binding the attestation fields to the recorded fulfiller.

fulfillmentIntentHash(bytes32,address,ad.notice: Hashes a splitter fulfillment intent from pre-encoded attestation data.
Hashes a splitter fulfillment intent from an already-computed data hash.

getSplits(address,bytes32,bytes32).notice: Returns native-token splits recorded by an oracle for a fulfillment intent and escrow.

hasDecision(address,bytes32).notice: Whether an oracle has recorded a decision for a decision key.

requestArbitration(bytes32,bytes32,addre.notice: Emits an arbitration request for a future fulfillment when called by the escrow attester or recipient.

unsafePartiallyCollectAndDistribute(byte.notice: Unsafe partial distribution -- continues on individual transfer failures.
